mdSummary:
# TagInput

Input that turns entries into removable tag chips.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Inputs
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/tag-input

## Parameters

|---|---|---|---|---|

| TagInput | Tags | `List<string>?` | `` |  |

| TagInput | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |

| TagInput | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| TagInput | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| TagInput | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TagInput | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
